meaning: Teilhard de 夏尔丹(即 Teilhard de Chardin ,Pierre)
examples: Teilhard DE Chardin died in 1955 and after that year his books were published.
In a painting by the 18th-century French artist Chardin, two young children are sitting down to eat.
And yet, in truth, the rise of table manners shapes our lives as firmly as it did those children painted by Chardin.
Braque, an equally rigorous painter, would later be described, for the precision and structure of his pictures, as the Chardin of cubism.
Little is known about Chardin the man.
